name: Ful Nabed (Egyptian Bean and Vegetable Soup)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Canned or cooked fava beans
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
A popular Egyptian soup, Ful Nabed is simple and nutritious.
1. In a large soup pot, sauté the onions and garlic in olive oil until the onions are translucent.
2. Add cumin, paprika, cayenne, bay leaves, and chopped carrots; cook on medium heat for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the chopped tomatoes and vegetable stock. Simmer until carrots are tender (about 15 minutes).
4. Add the cooked fava beans and parsley. Stir in lemon juice. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Ful Nabed can be served with Pita Bread and garnished with fresh mint leaves.
